notes: ⌘P quick switcher (attention-sorted lanes + their terminals, needs-you-first). Worktree status marks in the sidebar. ⌘N to create a new worktree. 10 new built-in themes (22 total). Smarter delete-worktree flow that reads git status and adapts the options. Claude Code's auto theme now follows the app theme. Fixed a false LIMIT badge from per-model rate caps.
